generated_oml:
instance AmbientLightMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light meter embedded within lighting fixtures, providing real‑time illumination data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientLightMeterTelemetry
]
instance OccupancyDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detector embedded in the building environment, providing real‑time presence data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDetectorTelemetry
]
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor established within the building environment, providing real‑time temperature data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorTelemetry
]
instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ sensor embedded within the building environment, providing real‑time CO₂ concentration data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2SensorTelemetry
]

instance AmbientLightMeterTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientLightMeter
]
instance OccupancyDetectorTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyDetector
]
instance TemperatureSensorTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance CO2SensorTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance AmbientLightMeterTwin : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON‑formatted device twin for the ambient light meter."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientLightMeterTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]
instance OccupancyDetectorTwin : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON‑formatted device twin for the occupancy detector."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDetectorTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]
instance TemperatureSensorTwin : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON‑formatted device twin for the temperature sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureSensorTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]
instance CO2SensorTwin : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON‑formatted device twin for the CO₂ sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2SensorTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]
instance BuildingDeviceTwin : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated JSON‑formatted building‑level twin containing all device twins and hierarchy."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM model containing device metadata, control logic, and hierarchy information."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMExtractionTool
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono facilitates real‑time telemetry transport from physical sensors to the digital twin."
]
instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto ingests device twins, providing real‑time data exchange and twin management."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringDashboardService, DeploymentService
]
instance BIMExtractionTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven engineering tool for extracting BIM semantics and generating runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables TransformationPipelineService
]
instance ModelIntegrityValidator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Validation tool that checks model integrity before artifact generation."
    DTDFVocab:enables TransformationPipelineService
]
instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning engine that updates policies based on post‑occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables RLUpdateService
]
instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine provides immersive 3D visualization of the building environment."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance SimulationFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation framework that analyses enriched BIM data for performance insights."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationAnalysisService
]

instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard that visualises sensor status and device twin health."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, DeploymentStatusInsight
]
instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that deploys runtime artifacts to the digital twin via Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentStatusInsight
]
instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service that forecasts occupancy and energy consumption."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveOccupancyInsight, EnergyConsumptionModel, OptimizedLightingScheduleInsight
]
instance RLUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that applies reinforcement learning updates to lighting control policies."
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyUpdateAction
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that renders immersive 3D visualisation using Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]
instance SimulationAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that simulates and analyses enriched BIM data."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]
instance TransformationPipelineService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑driven transformation pipeline that generates runtime artifacts from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ArtifactGenerationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing real‑time monitoring of all lighting fixtures and environmental sensors."
]
instance PredictiveOccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight delivering predictive occupancy forecasts based on sensor data."
]
instance EnergyConsumptionModel : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model of building energy consumption derived from sensor data."
]
instance OptimizedLightingScheduleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized lighting schedules generated by the digital twin."
]
instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight enabling immersive 3D visualization of the building."
]
instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from simulations performed on enriched BIM data."
]
instance DeploymentStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating deployment status of device twins via Hono/Ditto."
]
instance ArtifactGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful generation of runtime artifacts from BIM models."
]
instance PolicyUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action that updates lighting control policies using reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action to adjust lighting fixture levels according to DT recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingDimmingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting fixture dimming actuator that receives control signals and adjusts light intensity."
]
instance LightingSwitchingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting fixture switching actuator that toggles light devices on/off per control commands."
]

instance LivingLabBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains AmbientLightMeter, OccupancyDetector, TemperatureSensor, CO2Sensor,
            LightingDimmingActuator, LightingSwitchingActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT (e.g., dimming instructions) are published to the physical devices via Ditto over the Hono middleware, enabling bidirectional actuation"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time synchronization; data and control messages are exchanged with no explicit latency bound but operate in real‑time"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central Digital Twin hub orchestrating device twins via Hono/Ditto, embedding modular services (visualisation, analytics) and maintaining a unified real‑time representation of the building"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin covers design (ideal BIM), manufacturing (manufactured devices with annotated metadata), and operation (live operational data and control), managed through continuous model‑to‑runtime transformation"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluation of the DT–physical correspondence using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, ensuring high semantic alignment"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real‑time data exchange handled by the Eclipse Hono middleware and Ditto twin store, with devices publishing/subscribing to DT messages"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Distributed deployment of Eclipse Hono broker, Ditto runtime, and Unreal Engine renderer on an edge/cloud cluster; services orchestrated by containerized micro‑services managed via Kubernetes or equivalent orchestrator."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with BIM as the primary data source and standardized DT interfaces, enabling potential inter‑system communication via the Hono messaging layer"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with AECO‑specific BIM standards (IFC); use of OAuth/OpenID Connect for authentication with Hono/Ditto; adherence to ISO/IEC standards for secure IoT communication."
]
